subject: Last chance (6 hrs left)
body:
Your cart closes at midnight tonight (PT).

You can see what's inside & the full breakdown here: RECAP.ACQ.COM

OR if you prefer to read, I attached a letter there that explains everything.

Alex

PS - I'm taking your offer down for good in less than 6 hours.

PSS - Whether you buy or not, I just want to say thank you. You are my people. And no purchase will ever change that.
